ddls:
CREATE TABLE "caches" (
  "cache_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cache type */,
  "cache_name" TEXT /* Name of the cache */,
  "cache_type" TEXT /* Type of the cache (e.g., in-memory, distributed, file-based) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cache */,
  "read_only" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cache supports read-only access */,
  "nonstrict_read_write" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cache supports nonstrict-read-write access */,
  "read_write" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cache supports read-write access */,
  "transactional" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cache supports transactional access */,
  "max_size" INTEGER /* Maximum size of the cache in bytes */,
  "eviction_policy" TEXT /* Policy for evicting items from the cache (e.g., LRU, FIFO) */,
  "time_to_live_seconds" INTEGER /* Time-to-live for cache entries in seconds */,
  "distributed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cache is distributed */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the cache implementation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cache_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cache_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "cache_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cache type */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Name of the configuration parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the configuration parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration parameter */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the configuration parameter is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cache_configurations_cache_id FOREIGN KEY ("cache_id") REFERENCES caches ("cache_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was last updated */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the application is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cache_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application using the cache */,
  "cache_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cache type */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the cache was used */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of cache hits */,
  "misses" INTEGER /* Number of cache misses */,
  "evictions" INTEGER /* Number of cache evictions */,
  "invalidations" INTEGER /* Number of cache invalidations */,
  "hit_ratio" REAL /* Hit ratio calculated as hits / (hits + misses) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cache_usage_cache_id FOREIGN KEY ("cache_id") REFERENCES caches ("cache_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cache_usage_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cache_monitoring" (
  "monitoring_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring event */,
  "cache_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cache type */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric being monitored */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monitoring_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cache_monitoring_cache_id FOREIGN KEY ("cache_id") REFERENCES caches ("cache_id")
)
